description: This file defines a data model for a Job, including its status enumeration, label conversion, database serialization, and an immutable class with copy functionality.

classes.name: Job
classes.description: Immutable data class representing a job with various properties like id, outageId, crewName, status, creation timestamp, and optional summary.

methods.name: JobStatusX.label
methods.description: Returns a human-readable label for the JobStatus enum value.

methods.name: JobStatusX.fromDb
methods.description: Converts a string from the database into a JobStatus enum value, defaulting to pending if no match is found.

methods.name: JobStatusX.toDb
methods.description: Serializes a JobStatus enum value into its string representation for database storage.

methods.name: Job.copyWith
methods.description: Creates a copy of the Job instance with optional overrides for each property.
